description: Clean URL tracking, fix embeds (X, IG, FB, TikTok, Bluesky), catch link leaks FixupXer removes tracking parameters from URLs to protect your privacy and make links cleaner. When you share links from social media, shopping sites, or other platforms, they often contain hidden tracking codes that follow you around the internet. FixupXer strips these away. Key Features * Private Link Guard: Warns when e-mail addresses, auth tokens, or precise coordinates remain visible in a link — sensitive links stay out of history and cache * Browser Mode: Set FixupXer as your default browser for automatic system-wide URL cleaning * Direct Sharing: Share your links directly to FixupXer, no need to open the main app * Clean Link from Selection: Select a URL in any app and choose "Clean link" to clean it in place * Privacy Protection: Removes documented tracking keys across 26 host-bound platform cleaners; unknown functional parameters are kept so links do not break * Redirect Unwrapping: Extracts real destinations from Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube, Google Ads, Reddit, Bluesky, GeoRiot/Geniuslink, and LinkSynergy/Rakuten wrappers — entirely offline * Fast Processing: Cleans any URL in under 0.1 seconds with advanced caching * Offline Operation: Works completely offline - your URLs never leave your device * Platform Support: Works with 26 platforms including YouTube, Facebook, Amazon, Twitter/X, Instagram, TikTok, Bluesky, Bilibili, Google Search, Google Maps, LinkedIn, Reddit, Spotify, Wikipedia, and more * Smart Conversions: Optional conversion to embed-friendly alternatives (fixupx.com for Twitter/X, facebookez.com for Facebook, fxbsky.app for Bluesky posts, and selectable built-in or custom proxies for Instagram and TikTok) * Custom URL Rules: Build ordered offline rules with host or regex scopes, multiple processing phases, Test Lab previews, per-rule test vectors, Teach-from-example drafts, templates, and JSON import/export * History Tracking: Keep track of cleaned URLs with optional history feature * Configurable Actions: Choose what happens after cleaning - open in app, browser, share, or copy to clipboard * GitHub Guides: Open detailed Browser mode and Custom URL rules instructions from the How to Use links Browser Mode Setup 1. Enable Browser Mode in Settings 2. Set FixupXer as your default browser in Android Settings 3. Configure your preferred post-clean actions 4. All web links will now be automatically cleaned before opening Privacy & Security * Zero permissions required - no internet, location, or personal data access * 100% open source and auditable * No data collection or transmission * Works entirely on your device Technical Excellence * Modular architecture with 26 host-bound domain cleaners, one universal cleaner, and curated offline redirect unwrapping * Thread-safe design optimized for modern Android devices * Redesigned Material Design 3 interface with full dark mode and a System/Light/Dark theme picker * Full Android 15 compliance with edge-to-edge display support * Comprehensive test suite with browser-mode and URL-processing regression coverage Perfect for privacy-conscious users who want cleaner, safer links without the tracking.
